definition: Architecture quality including modularity loose coupling isolation fallback modes graceful degradation and critical-function prioritization
measurement_note: Use architecture reviews service boundaries failure-mode mapping blast-radius analysis and graceful-degradation test results

definition: Redundant capacity backup components alternate routes replicated services and failover options for critical functions
measurement_note: Use failover tests regional redundancy backup channel coverage and single-point-of-failure inventories

definition: Ability to understand system state dependencies errors latency anomalies logs traces metrics user impact and incident patterns
measurement_note: Use log coverage tracing metrics alert quality dependency monitoring and time-to-detection indicators

definition: Prevention detection containment identity security segmentation vulnerability management incident response and recovery capacity
measurement_note: Use MFA coverage patch latency detection time containment time backup restoration and incident exercise indicators

definition: Data accuracy provenance lineage validation privacy recoverability auditability and trustworthy information flow
measurement_note: Use validation checks lineage coverage audit trails data-quality indicators backup restoration and privacy controls

definition: Ability to repair update test document refactor deploy and safely change systems over time
measurement_note: Use technical-debt registers test coverage documentation ownership maps dependency inventories and change failure rate indicators

definition: Decision rights accountability vendor review incident governance auditability public-interest oversight and corrective-action tracking
measurement_note: Use ownership maps review cycles risk acceptance records vendor audits incident reports and corrective-action completion indicators

definition: Accessible fallback human override appeal paths operator sustainability worker recovery and user-centered resilience safeguards
measurement_note: Use accessibility tests manual fallback drills support burden on-call load burnout risk appeal metrics and user-impact reviews

definition: Portability cloud provider contingency data export contract review API fallback and migration readiness
measurement_note: Use export tests exit plans contract terms alternate provider readiness platform-dependence maps and migration runbooks

definition: Accumulated fragility from old code unsupported dependencies documentation gaps brittle integrations and under-maintained systems
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger maintainability review refactoring investment and resilience debt planning

definition: Administrative budget technical procurement staffing cultural and governance burden required to implement a resilience strategy
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger sequencing feasibility resource planning and change-management review
